body:
agent: identical tool calls repeated, aborting loop
result_rev=51e8b41e648e8a7db6ec3a1af71a52a05dd14739
base_rev=9434984d13bd85c58dde2b50a567cc82ebc58cbd

Claude sonnet retry after vidar-coder aborted with "identical tool calls repeated, aborting loop" on the first attempt. Landed commit c924bfa. Small partial-edit bead (swap "React frontend fetches" to "SvelteKit frontend queries via GraphQL" across 3 spec files). Self-verified: grep passes. Opus review skipped for this S/M-sized swap (same policy as ADR-005 supersede). APPROVE.
source: claude retry after vidar tool-call loop abort
summary: Merged c924bfa: partial edits to FEAT-002, FEAT-020, SD-019 replacing React/REST refs
